message:
test(conformance): fan out dtype_promotion_cases to full 18-type cross product

Expands crates/fnp-conformance/fixtures/dtype_promotion_cases.json
from the 59-case subset that landed earlier to the full 18-variant
ordered cross product (+1906 / -63 lines). Every fixture entry
preserves the reason_code / env_fingerprint / artifact_refs envelope
so the conformance runner continues to partition cases cleanly by
packet + reason.

Also wires trapezoid / trapz into crates/fnp-python/src/lib.rs's
test-module imports alongside the pre-existing
searchsorted / take / take_along_axis imports so the in-crate
tests can exercise the pyo3 entry points landed in the previous
commit.

.beads/issues.jsonl:

- br sync --flush-only for the matching fixture-fanout and
  trapezoid import beads. Status-only transitions.
